entries.gameplayFunction: Command panel, production queue, and tooltip recognition.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Single dominant symbol per unit class.
entries.materialNotes: Flat icon treatment, not painted scene art.
entries.colorNotes: Controlled palette with House cues only where needed.
entries.unityImportNotes: Sprite atlas family for command surface.

entries.silhouetteNotes: Roofline and function mark carry the icon.
entries.scaleNotes: Readable beside unit and resource icons.
entries.generationPromptNotes: One dominant building read, no tiny scenery scenes.
entries.unityImportNotes: Sprite atlas family for build menu and tooltips.

entries.gameplayFunction: House identification across UI, world markers, and portraits.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Distinct symbol families, not one-off crests only.
entries.materialNotes: Flat emblem language with heraldic discipline.
entries.scaleNotes: Must scale from tiny icon to banner usage.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Do not collapse House identity into a single static logo.
entries.unityImportNotes: Needs usage across UI, banners, decals, and portraits.

entries.silhouetteNotes: Strong symbolic forms for water, food, faith, command, alerts, and status.
entries.colorNotes: Use color for state tiering only after shape is readable.
entries.scaleNotes: Works in pills, alerts, overlays, and tooltips.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Should support the 11-pill and future expanded overlays.
entries.unityImportNotes: Sprite atlas and UI theme sheet family.

entries.visualRole: Selection rings, minimap symbols, and territorial overlays.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Simple geometric systems that survive heavy unit density.
entries.colorNotes: House and world-state colors must remain distinguishable.
entries.scaleNotes: Built for smallest UI read sizes and broad overlay sweeps.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Do not let glow and VFX replace clean geometry.
entries.unityImportNotes: Needed for both browser parity and Unity expansion.

entries.gameplayFunction: Bloodline presence, alerts, and status emphasis.
entries.silhouetteNotes: Portrait framing must preserve House read, age, role, and faith overlays.
entries.materialNotes: Painterly or rendered portraits allowed only if still grounded and readable.
entries.colorNotes: House and role cues stronger than background effects.
entries.scaleNotes: Works in panels, notifications, and keep view.
entries.generationPromptNotes: Keep grounded and lineage-driven; no fantasy glamor shots.
entries.unityImportNotes: Future keep-view and bloodline panel lane.
